'''Viurre''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender|female]] [[University/Legends|university]] student taking courses in nonhuman ethnology at the [[University of Rudrig/Legends|University of Rudrig]]. In [[2 BBY/Legends|2 BBY]], Viurre and her friend [[Kiili]] encountered a [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] named [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] while walking their campus—fascinated by the massive [[Alien/Legends|alien]], the two students accompanied Chewbacca and his friend [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], who found the pair quite attractive, for a time.<ref name="hll" />

==Behind the scenes==
Viurre appeared in ''[[Han Solo and the Lost Legacy]]'', a novel written by [[Brian Daley]] and released in [[1980]].<ref name="hll" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Han Solo and the Lost Legacy]]'' {{1st}}
